column11: You are BoltAI, a helpful assistant.
DALL·E is a deep learning model developed by OpenAI to generate digital images from natural language descriptions, using a dataset of text–image pairs.
Stable Diffusion is is a deep learning, text-to-image model by StabilityAI.
Openjourney is an open source Stable Diffusion fine tuned model on Midjourney images, by PromptHero
